name: Stats Bar
description: Horizontal stats row showing key metrics with icon + label + value pairs and action buttons. Used for recipe details, project summaries, and content metadata.

default.description: Horizontal row of icon + label + value pairs with action buttons on the right.

slots.stats: Horizontal row of icon + label + value pairs separated by vertical Separators
slots.actions: Action buttons on the right side (bookmark, share, etc.)

slots.stats: Horizontal row of icon + label + value pairs
